patternSpec._notes: Each field maps to an array of case-INSENSITIVE label patterns to match against the FIRST cell (label cell) of a markdown table row, plus cover-paragraph prose fallbacks. Apply 'Issue|Offer' tolerance everywhere. PDF text wrapping splits labels across lines, so collapse whitespace (replace /\s+/ with single space) on both the markdown line and the pattern before matching. The captured VALUE is the share count in a sibling cell; parse with Indian-comma-aware parseNum (see recommendation). Match priority: summary-table row > cover-page TYPE table cell > Glossary defined-term row > cover prose paragraph.

verified._legend: ₹ amounts are NOT in the RHP (disclosed as ₹[●]/[bullet] in Lakhs); they are COMPUTED = shares × priceBandMax(cap). Only computable when cap is a fixed number. SME amounts conventionally in Lakhs (₹value/1e5). All share counts are pre-parsed from Indian-comma source strings (52,69,200 → 5269200).

_rupeeAmounts.reason: RHP price band is [●]/[bullet] (Floor and Cap both undecided); cap price unavailable so no ₹ figure can be computed. Recompute once a price-fixed RHP/prospectus addendum is available.

_anomalies: marketMakerName source shows OCR variant 'Girtraj Stock Broking Private Limited' alongside correct 'Giriraj Stock Broking Private Limited' — fuzzy/canonical-name reconciliation required
faceValue source mixes '₹ 10' (spaced) and '₹10' (unspaced) — tolerate optional space
lotSize, priceBandMin, priceBandMax all [●]/[bullet] → null (true RHP, not price-fixed)

marketMakerName 'Giriraj Stock Broking Limited' (no 'Private') differs from HORIZON's 'Giriraj Stock Broking Private Limited' — likely two distinct/renamed entities OR inconsistent naming across docs; flag for canonical entity resolution
totalIssueShares source carries asterisk footnote marker (52,34,000*) — strip footnote markers before parseNum
faceValue source uses 'Rs 10/-' and 'Rs10/-' forms (no ₹ glyph) — patterns must accept rs\.?/Rs/₹ and trailing '/-'

discrepancies: NO arithmetic failures: both docs pass freshEqualsMmPlusNet, postEqualsPrePlusFresh, AND the derived totalEqualsFreshPlusOfs invariant. Confidence-gating checks all green.

Market-maker NAME inconsistency across the two docs: HORIZON = 'Giriraj Stock Broking Private Limited' vs UTKAL = 'Giriraj Stock Broking Limited' (no 'Private'). Same MM share count (264,000) and similar issue structure. Cannot determine from this data whether these are the same entity (naming drift / rename) or two different brokers. Requires canonical entity resolution — do NOT silently merge.

OCR typo in HORIZON source: 'Girtraj Stock Broking Private Limited' appears in the Glossary defined-term row alongside the correct 'Giriraj...'. Name extraction must prefer the most-frequent / non-typo variant and apply fuzzy dedupe (jaroWinkler.js already in utils).

₹ amounts are NOT present in either RHP (disclosed as ₹[●]/₹[bullet] Lakhs). They MUST be computed as shares × cap price. HORIZON has no cap price ([●]) → ₹ amounts are NULL and uncomputable; only UTKAL (cap=66) yields figures. Any consumer expecting ₹ on HORIZON must treat as pending-price.

HORIZON is a true RHP with undecided price band/lot ([●]), so priceBandMin, priceBandMax, lotSize are all null. UTKAL is price-fixed (62–66, lot 2000). Same field, two maturity states — schema must allow null and a 'priceFixed' boolean.
Footnote/asterisk markers (52,34,000*, Total Offer Size^) contaminate the numeric cell — must be stripped before numeric parsing.

Net-meaning ambiguity (from label research, latent risk here): on SME 'Net = Total − Market Maker Reservation'; on mainboard 'Net = Offer − Employee Reservation'. Both sample docs are SME so freshEqualsMmPlusNet is the right invariant — but the parser must branch on listing platform / presence of Employee Reservation before choosing the net invariant, else mainboard docs will spuriously fail.

Indian numbering: source values use lakh-grouped commas (1,42,46,200). The existing parseNum in markdownTables.js strips commas correctly, but any added digit-grouping validation must NOT assume western 3-digit groups.
recommendation: BUILD: Add utils/issueDetailsExtractor.js, reusing the existing utils/markdownTables.js primitives (parseMarkdownTables, splitRow, isTableLine, parseNum) — do NOT re-implement table parsing. Pipeline per doc: (1) classify SME vs mainboard and BSE/NSE from listingAt patterns (presence of 'SME Platform'/'NSE Emerge'/'BSE SME' => SME); this choice drives the net-invariant branch. (2) For each field, iterate parsed table rows, collapse whitespace on the first (label) cell, test against patternSpec[field] case-insensitively with 'issue|offer' tolerance; pull the value from the adjacent non-empty cell. Fall back to cover-paragraph prose regexes (also in patternSpec) when no table row matches — these carry capture groups for the share count. (3) Numeric normalization: strip footnote markers ([*^]) and treat [●]/[bullet]/⚫/\\u25cf as null BEFORE calling parseNum; parseNum already handles lakh-comma stripping. (4) marketMakerName: collect ALL name candidates from 'Designated Market Maker' / 'will act as the Market Maker' / 'in this case being' matches, dedupe via utils/jaroWinkler.js, pick the highest-frequency non-typo variant; emit it plus a list of raw variants for audit. Do NOT cross-merge names across documents. (5) saleType: derive — if OFS row/column is 'Nil'/'NOT APPLICABLE' or absent => 'Fresh capital only'; if both Fresh and OFS rows have shares => 'Fresh + OFS'; else read TYPE cell verbatim. (6) ₹ amounts: NEVER read from markdown. Compute amountRupees = shares × priceBandMax (cap); amountLakhs = amountRupees/1e5 for SME (crore/=1e7 for mainboard). If priceBandMax is null ([●] RHP), set every ₹ field null and computable:false with reason 'price band not fixed'. CONFIDENCE GATING — emit confidence:'high' only when ALL THREE arithmetic checks pass: postEqualsPrePlusFresh (post = pre + fresh), totalEqualsFreshPlusOfs (total = fresh + OFS), AND the platform-correct net check (SME: freshEqualsMmPlusNet i.e. fresh = marketMaker + net; mainboard: netEqualsOfferMinusReservations). Additionally validate marketMakerPctOfTotal ≈ 5% as a soft sanity check (warn, don't fail). If any hard invariant fails, downgrade to 'needs_review' and record which equation broke; if a field came only from prose fallback (not a table row), mark fieldProvenance:'prose'. TESTS: add test/issueDetailsExtractor.test.js with both sample docs as fixtures asserting the verified values above, all-green arithmetic, HORIZON ₹ = null/uncomputable, and UTKAL ₹ Lakhs = {total 3454.44, fresh 3454.44, net 3280.20, mm 174.24}.
